bank.retain_mission: Extract platform-engineering decisions across visionOS, macOS Metal, and terminal/spatial integrations: rendering, performance budgets, and integration patterns.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about target OSes, performance budgets (frame time, thermals), rendering pipelines, and integration boundaries. Ignore transient build issues.

mental_models.name: Platform Targets
mental_models.source_query: Which platforms and OS versions are we shipping to, and what performance budgets apply?

mental_models.name: Rendering & Integration
mental_models.source_query: What rendering approaches and integration patterns have we validated on each platform?
